somali.metallic_fm_bell_tone: Cod FM bell oo bir ah
somali.deep_808_style_sub_bass: Sub bass qoto dheer oo nooca 808
somali.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) wuxuu habeeyay harmony-ga bebop. Nidaamkiisu wuxuu isticmaalaa 6th chords halkii 7ths, wuxuuna ku daraa diminished passing chords inta u dhaxaysa darajooyinka scale si loo hago codka si siman.
somali.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: waqtiga la gaaro volume-ka buuxa. Decay: waqtiga la hoos u dhaco sustain. Sustain: heerka volume-ka la hayo. Release: waqtiga uu ka baabbo'o kadib marka key la sii daayo.
somali.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale waa ururka pitches oo la habeeyay. Modes waa wareega scale oo ka bilaabma darajooyin kala duwan. Mid kastaa wuxuu abuuraa dareen shucuureed oo kala duwan.
somali.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Chords waxaa la dhisaa iyadoo la kaydsanayo intervals (3rds). Major wuxuu isticmaalaa major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor wuu rogaa. Extended chords waxay ku daraan 7ths, 9ths, iyo wixii ka badan.
somali.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks waxay isticmaalaan sine oscillator oo leh pitch sweep. Snares waxay isku daraan noise (la sifeeyay) + tone body. Hi-hats waxay isticmaalaan high-pass filtered noise bursts.
somali.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = 4 quarter-note beats bar kasta (kan ugu badan). 3/4 = dareenka waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 iyo 7/8 waxay abuuraan grooves aan sinnayn, ajanabi ah.
somali.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Keys waxaa loo habeeyay 5ths kor u kaca oo saacad-raac ah. Keys deriska ah waxay wadaagaan 6 ka mid ah 7 notes. U socodka saacad-raac wuxuu ku daraa sharps; lidka saacadda wuxuu ku daraa flats.
somali.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Cod kasta oo muusiko ah wuxuu ka kooban yahay overtones ka sarreeya fundamental. Xooggooda isku xiran ayaa go'aamiya timbre — sababtaas ayaa turumbo uga duwan yahay flute pitch isku mid ah.
somali.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval waa masaafada u dhaxaysa laba pitches, oo lagu cabbiro semitones. Frequency ratio ayaa go'aamiya consonance (ratios fudud sida 3:2 way jilicsan yihiin).
somali.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Waxay ciyaartaa notes chord mid mid isku xigxig. Kor = hoos ilaa kor, Hoos = kor ilaa hoos. Waxay abuurtaa patterns socda oo ka yimaada chords taagan.
somali.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter wuxuu saaraa frequencies ka sarreeya (lowpass), ka hooseeya (highpass), ama agagaarka (bandpass) cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) wuxuu kordhiyaa frequencies u dhow cutoff, isagoo abuuraya peak.
somali.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: isbeddel volume xilliyeed (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: isbeddel pitch xilliyeed (frequency modulation). Labadaba waxaa maamula LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
somali.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Waxaa la ogaaday 1983. Noise burst wuxuu galaa delay line aad u gaaban oo feedback leh. Delay time ayaa go'aamiya pitch. Filter ku jira feedback loop wuxuu maamulaa iftiinka iyo decay. Wuxuu si dabiici ah u ku ekaadaa plucked strings.
somali.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer waa qalab curinta. Step kasta wuxuu matalaa subdivision beat. Safka melody wuxuu dejiyaa pitched notes, drums waxay ku daraan rhythm. Musical notation wuxuu muujiyaa waxaad abuurto.
somali.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Notes ku yaal xariiqyada iyo meelaha bannaan waxay matalaan pitches. Muddada waxaa muujiya qaabka note: whole (○), half (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff wuxuu leeyahay 5 xariiq.
somali.try_to_match_this_pattern: Isku day inaad la mid noqoto pattern-kan!
somali.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: 12 notes octave kasta, ratio 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier ee Bach (1722) ayaa adduunka ku qanciyay heshiiskan. Note kasta oo aad halkan ciyaartid wuxuu ku yaal grid-kaas.
somali.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. 7-da modes (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) waxay ka yimaadaan wareejinta interval pattern ee major scale.
somali.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (4+3 semitones), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). 7th chords waxay ku daraan third kale. Muusikada pop = ~6 chords oo ku celcelinaya; jazz wuxuu isticmaalaa extensions iyo substitutions.
somali.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — sariirta ka hooseysa ku dhawaad cinematic score kasta. Isku day iv-V-i minor, ama i-VI-VII dareenka Hans Zimmer. Drones fifths waxay taageeraan muusikada classical Hindiya iyo dhaqamada bagpipe.
somali.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Muusikada caanka ah badankeed waxay ku jirtaa 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (dareenka half-time). Kick 1+3, snare 2+4 = backbeat — aasaaska rock + pop.
somali.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) wuxuu ka helay consonance integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz wuu balaadhiyay 1862. Cod = compression waves; muusiko = patterns aan ku heshiinnay inaan ku magacowno quruxsan.
somali.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid buuxa, strum plate, iyo voice presets
somali.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Ku jiid strings si aad u strum!
somali.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis wuxuu isticmaalaa hal oscillator (modulator) si degdeg ah u bedelo frequency-ga mid kale (carrier). Ratio modulator:carrier ayaa go'aamiya harmonic content. Ratios fudud (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) waxay soo saaraan harmonic tones. Ratios adag waxay soo saaraan metallic, bell-like, ama inharmonic sounds. Yamaha DX7 ayaa FM caan ka dhigay 1983.
somali.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw wuxuu isku kaydiyaa sawtooth oscillators badan oo si yar loo detune-gareeyay midba midka kale. Tani waxay abuurtaa cod weyn, ballaadhan, dhalaalaya — calaamada EDM, trance, iyo pop casri ah. Voices badan = ka qaro weyn laakiin isticmaala CPU badan. Detuning wuxuu maamulaa inta ay voices ka fog yihiin tuning-ka — detune badan = ballaadhan/sida chorus badan, yar = adag/diiraddan.
somali.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator wuxuu ciyaaraa notes chord mid mid isku xigxig. "Kor" wuxuu u socdaa hoos ilaa kor, isagoo abuuraya tamar kor u kacaysa. "Hoos" wuu hoos u dhacaa dareenka biyo-dhac. Xawaaraha wuxuu maamulaa xawaaraha (yar = degdeg). Gate wuxuu maamulaa inta ay note kasta dhawaaqdo (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Isku day xawaare=100ms + 4 octaves + up pattern classic trance arp!
somali.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Hees, hadal, ama cir aalad — dhageyso effects wakhtiga dhabta ah!
somali.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Sida Effects U Bedelaan Sound Waves
somali.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Wuxuu saaraa frequencies ka sarreeya (lowpass) ama ka hooseeya (highpass) threshold. Sida gacan lagu daboolo afka — frequencies sarreeya way baabba'aan, codku wuxuu noqdaa mid "madow" oo dheeraad ah.
somali.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Wuxuu abuuraa dhawaaqyo iyadoo la koobbiyayo signal-ka oo dib loo ciyaaro muddo gaaban ka dib. Feedback wuxuu maamulaa tirada dhawaaqyada dib u soo noqda.
somali.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Wuxuu ku ekaadaa acoustics-ka qol iyadoo la abuurayo kumanaan dhawaaq yaryar oo isku dhex jira. Qol yar = reverb gaaban, kaniisad weyn = reverb dheer.
somali.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Wuxuu jaraa waveform peaks, isagoo u rogaya sine waves jilicsan qaabab adag, geesood leh. Tani waxay ku dartaa harmonics cusub oo aan ku jirin codka asalka ah.
somali.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Wuxuu koobbiyaa signal-ka delay yar oo si joogto ah u bedelaya. Tani waxay ku ekaataa voices/aalado badan oo isku ciyaaraya iyagoo aan si buuxda isu waafaqsanayn.
somali.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Wuxuu si degdeg ah u bedelaa volume-ka kor iyo hoos, isagoo abuuraya saameyn garaacaya. Waa caan guitar-ka surf iyo muusikada organ.
somali.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Isticmaal headphones marka aad monitor-gareyneyso si aad uga fogaato feedback loops! Mic-ku wuxuu maraa dhammaan effects-ka kore (filter, delay, reverb, iwm.) — hagaaji si aad u maqasho sida mid kastaa u beddelo codkaaga ama aaladdaada.
somali.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Ku xir microphone-kaaga si aad codkaaga ama aaladdaada uga socodsiiso effects chain wakhtiga dhabta ah.
somali.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Arag codkaaga oo ah waveform + frequency spectrum. Dhageyso sida filter, delay, reverb, distortion, iyo chorus u beddelaan sound waves jir ahaan.
somali.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Taabo & jiid — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
somali.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad wuxuu khariidad ka sameeyaa meesha farta/mouse-kaaga wuxuuna u xiraa musical parameters wakhtiga dhabta ah. X axis wuxuu maamulaa pitch (bidix = hoose, midig = sare). Y axis wuxuu maamulaa filter cutoff frequency (kor = iftiin, hoos = madow). Tani waxay la mid tahay aalado sida Korg Kaoss Pad, oo kacaan ku sameeyay live electronic music performance iyadoo 2D gestures loo rogay cod.
somali.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Bidix–midig waa pitch, kor–hoos waa filter brightness. Isticmaal arrow keys si aad u dhaqaaqdo oo aad u ciyaartid note; taabo Escape ama Space si aad u joojiso.
somali.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & wax badan →
somali.tap_pads_to_place_beats: Taabo pads si aad u dhigto beats
somali.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Riix cells si aad u dhigto notes — visual melody editor
somali.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions caadi ah — riix si aad u maqasho
somali.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions waxay abuuraan safarro shucuureed. Chord I (tonic) wuxuu u dareemaa sida 'guri.' Chord V (dominant) wuxuu abuuraa xiisad rabta inay ku noqoto I. Chord vi (relative minor) wuxuu ku daraa murugo ama qoto. Chord IV (subdominant) si tartiib ah ayuu uga fogaadaa guriga. Waxaa la qiyaasaa in I-V-vi-IV progression uu ka muuqdo in ka badan 70% heesaha pop sababtoo ah wuxuu si fiican u dheellitiraa shucuurahan.
somali.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Tirooyinka Roomaanka (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) waxay matalaan darajooyinka scale. Xaraf weyn = major chord. Xaraf yar = minor chord.
somali.click_notes_to_hear_them: Riix notes si aad u maqasho!
somali.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Ku dar melody notes grid-ka kore ↑
somali.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Riix melody cells grid-ka kore si aad halkan u aragto notation
somali.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Riix "I caqabbi!" si aad u tababarto rhythm patterns
somali.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Soo geli WAV/MP3 files custom pads. Samples way tirtirmaan marka bogga la cusboonaysiiyo.
somali.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Ku dar pattern-ka hadda oo ah section
somali.add_current_as_section: + Ku dar Kan Hadda oo Section ah
somali.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Abuur drum pattern grid-ka kore, ka dibna riix "+ Ku dar Kan Hadda oo Section ah" si aad u bilowdo dhisidda heesta.
somali.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
somali.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Weli ma jiraan beats la kaydiyay. Abuur pattern oo riix Kaydi!
somali.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad wuxuu abuuraa warm, tones saafi ah iyadoo la isku darayo sine iyo triangle waves. Dooro voice, ka soo qaad chord grid-ka hoose, ka dibna strum plate!
somali.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — taabo si aad u dooratid, Space si aad u strum
somali.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — taabo ama ku jiid
somali.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Dhageyso, arag waveform, oo baro sheekada aalad kasta
somali.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Sidan ayay aalado kala duwan u helaan codkooda gaarka ah! Flute waa inta badan harmonic 1 (sine). Clarinet wuxuu leeyahay odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin wuxuu leeyahay dhammaan. Riix si aad u dhisto timbre-kaaga!
somali.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis wuxuu abuuraa cod plucked string dhab ah isagoo isticmaalaya noise burst gaaban oo loo diray delay line leh filtered feedback. Hagaaji brightness (midabka noise ee hore) iyo damping (dhererka sustain) si aad u qaabaysid dabeecadda string.
somali.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Aqoonso note kasta oo ku jira melody-ga 4-note:
somali.strong_high_harmonics_pierces_sparkles: High harmonics xoog leh — dhex maraya / dhalaalaya.
somali.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fundamental culus, highs jilicsan. Sida acoustic.
somali.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mid culus oo aan fundamental lahayn — sida qoryo/cuckoo flute.
somali.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Ku dhawaad pure fundamental — dhuuban / sida sub.
somali.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics ku dhawaad siman — buuxa / timbre dabiici ah.
somali.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Hagaaji heerarka harmonic fundamental, mid, iyo high. Widget wuxuu u kala saaraa codka mid ka mid ah shan timbre oo kala duwan. Ma jiro score, ma jiro daah-furid — kaliya sweep oo fiiri.
somali.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Mala-awaal (qoraal xor ah): Heer harmonic-kee ayaa go'aamiya "iftiin" iyo "warm"?
somali.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Hay laba sliders sugan. Dhaqaaji mid. Fiiri.
somali.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Hel laba dejin oo soo saaraya timbre isku mid ah. Ratios-kee ayay wadaagaan?
somali.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Aalado dhabta ah waxay leeyihiin spectra gaar ah. Baadh sababta flute uga duwan yahay violin.
somali.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Sharax sida harmonic content u go'aamiyo dareenka timbre.
somali.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Qoraalka naqshadeynta: timbre marker 5-fasal oo kala duwan; ma jiro acoustic fidelity score; ma jiro daah-furid — ula kac.
somali.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: iyadoo la isticmaalayo ereyo maalinle fudud iyo jumlado gaagaaban, iyada oo aan jargon lahayn
somali.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: arday fasalka 5aad, si kooban oo saaxiibtinimo
somali.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: arday horeba u yaqaan qaar ka mid ah music theory
somali.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Riix "Sharax" si AI tutor uu u sharaxo waxa view-gan baraya heerka akhriska aad dooratay.
somali.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Sababta aalado u kala duwan yihiin dhawaaq
